question.label: Being safe
question.name: When you say 'being safe,' what do you hold back from doing?
question.description: Drills into his own phrase to surface the specific behaviour he avoids in cross-team decisions.

answer: I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.

assessment.note: He names a specific avoided behaviour—asking for sharper feedback earlier—which signals mild lack of early alignment; also suggests cautious, self-protective operating rather than sustainable confidence.

new_queue.label: Sharper feedback
new_queue.name: Sharper feedback earlier — what are you usually waiting for before you ask?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Questioning cadence
new_queue.name: What tends to stop you from asking a question early?

new_queue.label: Next signal
new_queue.name: What would you want me to see differently by our next check-in?
